source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Mummy
abilities.effect: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker’s Ability to Mummy.

abilities.name: Wandering Spirit
abilities.effect: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

abilities.name: Ball Fetch
abilities.effect: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

abilities.name: Rattled
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug move.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

abilities.name: Speed Boost
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.

abilities.name: Compound Eyes
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's compound eyes boost its accuracy.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

abilities.name: Speed Boost
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.

abilities.name: Tinted Lens
abilities.effect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon can use “not very effective” moves to deal regular damage.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

abilities.name: Stakeout
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
abilities.flavor_text: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

abilities.name: Strong Jaw
abilities.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

abilities.name: Adaptability
abilities.effect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Dark Aura
abilities.effect: Strengthens Dark moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.
